column14:
❗ Caution: Be cautious when combining Triphala with cisplatin-based chemotherapy, particularly in patients at risk for altered metabolism or enhanced toxicity.

🩹 Monitor: If used concurrently, monitor cisplatin plasma levels, clinical response, and toxicity markers (e.g., nephrotoxicity, neuropathy).

⚠️ Dose Adjust/Consult: Consider dose adjustments or advising against simultaneous use until more clinical data are available.

📌 Research Gap: Human clinical trials are needed to clarify the clinical significance of this interaction.
